text.message: Am I that much of a threat to get stolen from twice lol
My game is over if you take my port
Cool, do it I’ll just solo all gsme
I didn’t even rob you lmao
But you robbed me earlier as well
Dude you win with that port
Like we’re playing to see who’s 2nd
oj do u have any brick for trade
Blocked and I was stolen twice lmao
idk y they stole from u twice
And he plowed for a port he doesn’t even need
Cuz if he got that spot early it was gg
Very odd play I don’t even comprehend
It’s one thing to plow, but also to block and steal from me
You’re in diamond league for a reason
But catan is a very simple game
I’m sure I’m the strongest spot
Don’t look at reds set up at all
Trust me I’m seeing reds setup
Welll yeah if you’re giving him wheat
Getting the wood pot with double 6 would ve been 10X better for your game
No kidding I have no chance you idiot
It’s also about I know I lose for sure if I get the wood port and you get the wheat port
I don’t know hot to tell you this
green do u have an ore for sale?
But me getting wheat port would’ve been the least of your worries
oh u want me to move it
All you did was halt both of our games
What a trade jajaja gg blue
